subject: Re: Memory of tomogram CTF
body:
You meant the language of OS? or Warp? I haven't ever found the language 
settings of Warp&M.

在2021年3月22日星期一 UTC+8 下午9:14:23<alist...@gmail.com> 写道：

> Hi Yuqi,
>
> If you’re talking about even/odd images for training the noise2noise 
> network, these should have no bearing on tilt-series CTF estimation but the 
> fact that there are problems there shows there might be problems elsewhere 
> - possibly due to language settings as I mentioned
>
> Cheers and good luck!
>
> Alister
>
> On 22 Mar 2021, at 11:08, yuqi zhang <8245...@qq.com> wrote:
>
> I have done the CTF estimation of each tilt-series before reconstruct. I 
> will run it again and send the error message. 
>
> I have another question. When I did the tilt-series preprocessing(for 
> example, 1000 .mrc files), I found that there were only 130 denoising 
> output files while the number of other output files were correct. I 
> wondered whether it would affect the results or the preprocessing quality. 
> How can I deal with it? Now, I run 41*3 tilt-series micrographs at a time. 
> It seemed like not convenient.
>
> 在2021年3月22日星期一 UTC+8 下午6:49:32<alist...@gmail.com> 写道：
>
>> Hi Yuqi,
>>
>> Something about your workflow seems a bit wrong - you should estimate the 
>> CTF of each tilt-series then reconstruct the tomograms.
>> Can you share the error and some information about your images (detector? 
>> Super-resolution?)? 
>>
>> Your hardware should be fine for what you’re trying to do - some people 
>> have mentioned previously that changing language settings to US English 
>> (particularly the decimal separator) has solved problems for them.
>>
>> Cheers,
>>
>> Alister
>>
>> On 22 Mar 2021, at 10:41, yuqi zhang <8245...@qq.com> wrote:
>>
>> After reconstructing the tomogram with Warp, I did CTF as tutorial. 
>> However, there was an error that memory was not enough. My hardware was 
>> 1080Ti 12G, RAM 128G. I didn't know the hardware requirements that could do 
>> all of tomogram data processing in Warp and M.
>>
>> --
